title: Xtra Smoky British Salmon Skewers
description: Smoky, flaky, and festive, these British salmon skewers are perfect for any occasion, featuring a hint of red food coloring and a deliciously charred flavor from the grill.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, red food coloring, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the salmon pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the smoky mixture.
Thread the salmon pieces onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the salmon is cooked through and slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve immediately on a lazy-susan-spinner.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as roasted vegetables or quinoa.
Refrigerate any leftovers and consume within 24 hours.
